Atty. NELSON W. GOODELL, Esq. of the Goodell Law Firm (Tel: 415-495-3950) for plaintiff;
Atty. LUANNE RUTHERFORD, Esq. of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP (Tel: 415-433-0990) for defendant 101 Valencia Residential Association.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JAMES HAWTHORNE's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 2023.010, 2023.030, 2030.300, And 2031.310.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications, as follows:

Motions granted in part; denied in part. As to the Interrogatories, granted as to Nos. 3, 9, 24, 27-32, 41, Form Interrogatory No. 17.1. Since Defendant has elected to refer to documents in its responses, it must provide the specific bates stamp numbers. Denied as to Special Interrogatory Nos. 4-6. As to RFPD No. 1 and 35, a compound objection is not appropriate for RFPDs. Supplemental responses to be provided by January 24, 2024. The issue of sanctions is deferred pending preparation of the supplemental responses. Defendant shall email the supplemental responses to JPT McDonald by January 24, 2024.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Set For Trial On May-20-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Off Calendar

Nelson W. Goodell Esq. for plaintiff(s) James Hawthorne.

Case is converted to jury trial. Trial date remains May-20-2024, and there will be no further continuances due to scheduling conflicts.
